acceptance_criteria.text: Agent run detail exposes runtime observability and embeds OpenClaw support/audit/outbox outputs into the agent run surface.
proof: run.observability contains run_history, step_history, artifacts, approvals, action_ledger, delivery_status, cost_tokens, errors, recovery_actions, support_export.

Production checks passed: docker compose ps, app logs, curl -I http://localhost:8000, live frontend asset smoke.
Production route smoke passed for /api/agent-runs/<run_id> and /api/agent-runs/<run_id>/support-export.

ssh ... "cd /opt/seo-app && docker compose exec -T app python3 - <<'PY' ..."
